c21370.st: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by [the] will of God,

c21372.st: To the saints in Colossae, [the] faithful brothers in Christ:

c21396.st: bearing fruit in every good work,

c21404.st: He has rescued us from the dominion of darkness

c21406.st: in whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins.

c21407.st: [The Son] is [the] image of the invisible God,

c21409.st: For in Him all things were created, [things] in heaven and on earth,

c21411.st: whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities.

c21421.st: and through Him to reconcile to Himself all things,

c21422.st: by making peace through the blood of His cross.

c21423.st: whether things on earth or things in heaven,

c21424.st: Once you were alienated [from God] and were hostile in your minds because of [your] evil deeds.

c21425.st: But now He has reconciled [you] by [Christ᾽s] physical body through death

c21426.st: to present you holy, unblemished, and blameless in His presence —

c21427.st: if indeed you continue in [your] faith,

c21429.st: not moved from the hope of the gospel you heard,

c21430.st: which has been proclaimed in all creation under heaven,

c21431.st: [and] of which I, Paul, have become a servant.

c21435.st: I became its servant by the commission God gave me ... to you

c21446.st: so that we may present everyone perfect in Christ.

c21458.st: in whom are hidden all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.

c21503.st: who delights in [false] humility and [the] worship of angels

c21506.st: and he loses connection to the head,

c21508.st: supported and knit together by [its] joints and ligaments,

c21510.st: If you have died with Christ to the spiritual forces of the world,

c21522.st: seated at [the] right hand of God.
